description_long: This is a rectangular wooden cabinet with a natural light oak finish, featuring a symmetrical design. The front face has two large side compartments with flat doors and a central recessed section containing two open shelves. The top surface is flat except for the central cut-out, which provides access to the shelves below. The back of the cabinet is plain, with visible mounting brackets suggesting it can be secured to a wall. The overall construction appears sturdy, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic suitable for modern urban environments.
description: A light oak-finished wooden cabinet with two side doors and a central open shelving section, featuring a recessed cut-out on top.
description_view_0: Side view showing the cabinet's depth and the stepped profile of the central recessed section.
description_view_1: Front view displaying two large side doors and a central open shelving area with a recessed cut-out above.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the stepped profile of the central cut-out.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain back panel with four visible mounting brackets for wall attachment.
